options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -displayStep
options.description: range step for displaying the pin density map

options.name: -gridInMicron
options.description: specify the value (in micron) of side of square grid for pin density calculations.

options.name: -gridInRow
options.description: specify the value (in row-height) of side of square grid for pin density calculations.

options.name: -threshold
options.description: threshold value over which the densities must be reported.
